pageTitle: BitVoy - From a Bit to a Voyage

hero.tagline: From a Bit to a Voyage.
hero.title: That Small Step Becomes a Global Voyage.
hero.lead: Pack your smartphone. Your adventure begins now. BitVoy is your portal to a new economic adventure. We connect you to real-world projects across the globe—safely, intuitively, and without the boring finance talk.
hero.note: BitVoy is not a financial investment product. It is a participation platform for your life's journey.

vision.title: Vision
vision.subtitle: Say Goodbye to Boring Numbers.
vision.body: BitVoy transforms the locked gate of "scary finance" into an open portal for adventure. We invite you to take that first small step (Bit) and join a global guild of explorers on a shared journey (Voyage) through real-world ventures.

why.title: Why BitVoy
why.subtitle: Travel Far, Travel Safe.
why.lead: We turn "hard and scary" into "safe and intuitive" so you can focus on the adventure ahead.

shield.title: Equip the Ultimate Shield
shield.body: A security model built for real life. We cover human mistakes—loss, change, and recovery—so you can explore without fear.

magic.title: Start Like Magic
magic.body: No heavy armor required. Skip the confusing installations and setups. dive into the world of Web3 as easily as browsing your favorite website.

hero.title: Be the Hero, Not a Spectator
hero.body: Don't just watch the charts. Connect with real projects and communities. Your involvement allows you to become part of the story.

allies.title: New Allies, New Horizons
allies.body: As our alliance of partners grows, so does your map. Your benefits and experiences expand with every new partnership we forge.

pay.title: Pay & Send
pay.subtitle: Make Every Transaction a Breeze.
pay.body: Seamless QR payments and transfers that feel as natural as a handshake.

participate.title: Participate
participate.subtitle: High-Five the World.
participate.body: Get closer to global ventures and Real-World Assets (RWA). Touch the projects you support.

belong.title: Belong
belong.subtitle: Join the Guild.
belong.body: Unlock membership benefits that make your journey deeper, richer, and more rewarding.

founder.title: Founder Membership
founder.subtitle: A Passport for the Journey.
founder.lead: This is not a financial product. It is your key to the future.
founder.body: The Founder Membership is an exclusive pass designed for early explorers. It's not about chasing yields; it's about accessing unique experiences, priority lanes, and real-world privileges.

bullets.gear: Gear Up for Less: Fee discounts and priority access to new features.
bullets.quests: Secret Quests & Early Drops: Unlock Founder-only experiences and be the first to receive "supply drops" from partners.
bullets.perks:
Real-World Perks (RWA):
Use your digital key to unlock access to rare trading cards, unique creator works,
and entertainment experiences across Japan and around the world.
bullets.legacy: Wear Your Legacy: Exclusive badges and titles that prove you were here from the start.
bullets.voting: Voting Power: Hold the compass. Have a say in where our journey goes next.

1.title: 1) Begin Your Saga
1.body: Create your account in seconds. Start safely with zero prior knowledge.

2.title: 2) Explore the Map
2.body: One identity for everything. Pay, swap, and access partner experiences seamlessly.

3.title: 3) Level Up Together
3.body: Stay involved. As the ecosystem expands, your journey evolves with new rewards and discoveries.

q1.a: No. BitVoy is a participation platform for adventurers. We do not offer profits, yields, or ROI. We offer experiences and access.

q2.a: It is a "First-Class Passport" for early supporters, focusing on ecosystem benefits, community status, and exclusive access.

q3.a: It signifies a small first step (Bit) that turns into a grand shared journey (Voyage) through global ventures and experiences.

cta.title: The Map is Open. Your Ship Awaits.
cta.lead: Take your first small step—safely, intuitively, and boldly.
